tasks.title: Lead CSV Import/Export. Add bulk import and export for leads [W8]. Import: CSV upload with validation, duplicate detection, field mapping UI, error report. Export: CSV and JSON formats, filtered export (current view), all-fields export. Common CRM feature needed for data migration and reporting. Also cleanup: Prisma schema backslash comments to standard // format [S12].
tasks.description: Lead CSV Import/Export. Add bulk import and export for leads [W8]. Import: CSV upload with validation, duplicate detection, field mapping UI, error report. Export: CSV and JSON formats, filtered export (current view), all-fields export. Common CRM feature needed for data migration and reporting. Also cleanup: Prisma schema backslash comments to standard // format [S12].
tasks.summary: CSV import with validation UI and error report; CSV/JSON export with filter support; Prisma comments standardized; import handles duplicates gracefully; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: CSV import with validation UI and error report; CSV/JSON export with filter support; Prisma comments standardized; import handles duplicates gracefully; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: CSV import with validation UI and error report; CSV/JSON export with filter support; Prisma comments standardized; import handles duplicates gracefully; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Contact Bulk Import & Service Layer Fixes. (1) No CSV upload or bulk create for contacts (W-08). (2) listContacts service returns empty array as default when no ownerId/accountId — latent bug for future callers (W-15). (3) getContactStatistics returns empty for undefined ownerId (W-16). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.description: Contact Bulk Import & Service Layer Fixes. (1) No CSV upload or bulk create for contacts (W-08). (2) listContacts service returns empty array as default when no ownerId/accountId — latent bug for future callers (W-15). (3) getContactStatistics returns empty for undefined ownerId (W-16). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.summary: CSV import endpoint for contacts; listContacts supports findAll with pagination; getContactStatistics handles ADMIN role; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: CSV import endpoint for contacts; listContacts supports findAll with pagination; getContactStatistics handles ADMIN role; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: CSV import endpoint for contacts; listContacts supports findAll with pagination; getContactStatistics handles ADMIN role; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Account Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) calculateAccountHealth() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-02). (2) getAccountWithContext() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-03). (3) Revenue NaN risk — Number(revenue) on non-numeric string renders '$NaNM' (F-14). (4) Health bar arbitrary scale — no documented max value (F-15). (5) Contact firstName[0] undefined risk in AccountContactsList (F-18). (6) findAncestors N+1 query pattern (B-14). (7) Merge/Archive toast stubs referencing IFC-044 (F-03/F-04). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 9, 13, 16-17.
tasks.description: Account Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) calculateAccountHealth() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-02). (2) getAccountWithContext() unreachable from router — decide: wire (D-03). (3) Revenue NaN risk — Number(revenue) on non-numeric string renders '$NaNM' (F-14). (4) Health bar arbitrary scale — no documented max value (F-15). (5) Contact firstName[0] undefined risk in AccountContactsList (F-18). (6) findAncestors N+1 query pattern (B-14). (7) Merge/Archive toast stubs referencing IFC-044 (F-03/F-04). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 9, 13, 16-17.
tasks.summary: Dead code either wired to router procedures or removed; revenue NaN guarded with fallback; health bar has documented max; firstName fallback for empty string; findAncestors uses recursive CTE; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Dead code either wired to router procedures or removed; revenue NaN guarded with fallback; health bar has documented max; firstName fallback for empty string; findAncestors uses recursive CTE; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Dead code either wired to router procedures or removed; revenue NaN guarded with fallback; health bar has documented max; firstName fallback for empty string; findAncestors uses recursive CTE; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Deal Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) 11 dead service methods unreachable from router: listOpportunities, advanceStage, updateValue, updateProbability, updateExpectedCloseDate, reopenOpportunity, getPipelineForecast, getOpportunitiesClosingSoon, getHighValueOpportunities, getOpportunitiesByAccount, getOpportunitiesByContact, getWinRateStatistics (B-13). Decide: wire to router or remove. (2) toMoney/toPercentage silent zero fallback on DB corruption (B-14). (3) TOCTOU in stage transitions — no optimistic locking (B-16). (4) Event publish failure swallowed with console.error only (B-17). (5) DealQuickView is a 49-line stub not used anywhere (F-13). (6) RecommendedActions.onActionClick not wired at forecast page level (F-18). (7) Sidebar deals config settingsHref points to /settings/deals instead of /settings/pipeline (W-03). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 6-7.
tasks.description: Deal Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) 11 dead service methods unreachable from router: listOpportunities, advanceStage, updateValue, updateProbability, updateExpectedCloseDate, reopenOpportunity, getPipelineForecast, getOpportunitiesClosingSoon, getHighValueOpportunities, getOpportunitiesByAccount, getOpportunitiesByContact, getWinRateStatistics (B-13). Decide: wire to router or remove. (2) toMoney/toPercentage silent zero fallback on DB corruption (B-14). (3) TOCTOU in stage transitions — no optimistic locking (B-16). (4) Event publish failure swallowed with console.error only (B-17). (5) DealQuickView is a 49-line stub not used anywhere (F-13). (6) RecommendedActions.onActionClick not wired at forecast page level (F-18). (7) Sidebar deals config settingsHref points to /settings/deals instead of /settings/pipeline (W-03). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 6-7.
tasks.summary: Dead code either wired to router or removed; toMoney/toPercentage propagate errors; event publish has retry; DealQuickView wired or removed; sidebar settingsHref fixed; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Legal Document Management UI Wiring. Wire 6 dead legal router endpoints: appointments.findNextSlot, documents.grantAccess, documents.placeLegalHold, documents.releaseLegalHold, documents.revokeAccess, documents.submitForReview. Backend built (IFC-137, IFC-140, IFC-152), zero web callers. Decision: build legal management UIs to consume these. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 78-83.

tasks.title: Security Admin + Notifications Settings Wiring. Wire 6 dead endpoints: security.audit.getByResource, security.audit.getMyActivity, security.audit.getSecurityEvents, notifications.batchAction, notifications.getPreferences, notifications.updatePreferences. Backend built (IFC-098, IFC-072, IFC-046, IFC-157), zero web callers. Decision: build admin security page + notification settings page (PG-116). Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 93-95, 101-103.

tasks.title: Scheduled Report Generation — BullMQ cron job that generates daily/weekly analytics snapshots and emails summary reports to team leads. Includes: report template system (pipeline summary, lead conversion, revenue trends, SLA compliance), PDF/HTML report rendering, email delivery via notifications worker, configurable schedule per tenant, report archive storage
